014],[432,506,1776530335026],[420,505,1776530335041],[405,506,1776530335052],[390,507,1776530335063],[374,509,1776530335075],[358,511,1776530335088],[344,514,1776530335101],[332,517,1776530335112],[323,519,1776530335125],[316,521,1776530335139],[312,522,1776530335156],[310,522,1776530335171],[310,522,1776530335188],[311,522,1776530335203],[312,522,1776530335241],[312,521,1776530335269],[313,521,1776530335286],[314,521,1776530335317],[315,521,1776530335345],[315,521,1776530335368],[316,520,1776530335380],[317,520,1776530335395],[318,520,1776530335415],[318,519,1776530335424],[319,519,1776530335431],[320,519,1776530335439],[321,518,1776530335457],[322,518,1776530335475],[323,518,1776530335490],[324,517,1776530335519],[324,517,1776530335548],[325,516,1776530335560],[326,516,1776530335585],[327,515,1776530335600],[326,516,1776530335609]],"mm-mp":18.09198423127464,"md":[[221,464,1776530329102],[315,520,1776530335354]],"md-mp":3026.25,"mu":[[221,464,1776530329176],[315,520,1776530335540]],"mu-mp":3056.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
